EmailTemplate.description: This email template will be sent to customers whose cases are closed
EmailTemplate.name: Case Closed External
EmailTemplate.subject: Your case has been closed.
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Contact.FirstName}
This is courtesy email to let you know that we have closed your case with reference number {!Case.CaseNumber}.
If you need to speak to us urgently, please call our phone line on 01242 808 740. Lines are open Monday – Friday between 8am and 5:30pm.
We would like to thank you for your patience.
